meaning: 德岛[日本四国岛东岸港市]
examples: After obtaining M. Eng from Tokushima University in 1972, He worked for Kyoto University as a research assistant.
OLETF rat, a spontaneous type 2 diabetic rat with mild obesity, was established by Tokushima Research Institute Otsuka Pharmaceutical in Japan.
To make up mother's regret, Sakiko took her to see the famous local Awa Odori. The dance stir up the hot night in Tokushima, and the miracle appeared…
Voters in Tokushima, on the island of Shikoku, are fighting construction-ministry bureaucrats over a new dam for the nearby Yoshino river.
After a referendum in Tokushima in which the locals voted against a new dam, the mayor, a construction-ministry old boy, abandoned his support for the project.
